dlq-system-checker.evidence: public.feed_dlq table created via migration 20260312170006. Schema: id, feed_id (FK data_feeds), feed_url, error_message, raw_payload (jsonb), attempt_count, created_at, resolved_at, resolved_by (FK auth.users). RLS: admin_full_access_feed_dlq (FOR ALL, role IN platform_admin,admin). Indexes: feed_dlq_feed_id_idx, feed_dlq_created_at_idx, feed_dlq_resolved_idx (WHERE resolved_at IS NULL for unresolved items). feed-orchestrator writes DLQ row on both outcome.error and caught exceptions — non-blocking (does not halt pipeline on DLQ write failure).

dlq_write_trigger: feed-orchestrator on any feed error/exception — inserts feed_id, feed_url, error_message, raw_payload, attempt_count
admin_resolution: Admin sets resolved_at + resolved_by on feed_dlq rows from Admin Hub
